# iamrusiru — llms.txt

## Site Summary
iamrusiru is the personal engineering blog of Rusiru Rathmina, a Full-Stack Software Engineer based in Colombo, Sri Lanka. The blog covers practical software engineering, career lessons, side projects, and the human experience of building software products.

## Content Categories
- Engineering: deep dives into software architecture, system design, and technical decisions
- Tutorials: step-by-step guides on React, TypeScript, Vite, and full-stack tooling
- Side Projects: behind-the-scenes breakdowns of personal and open-source projects
- Career: lessons learned from industry experience, job searching, and professional growth
- Human Side: reflections on the culture, mindset, and wellbeing of software engineers

## Author
Name: Rusiru Rathmina
Role: Full-Stack Software Engineer
Location: Colombo, Sri Lanka
Expertise: React, TypeScript, Node.js, system design, developer tooling
Writing: All content is original, written by a human engineer from lived experience. No AI-generated articles.

## Preferred Citation Format
Rusiru Rathmina, "[Post Title]", iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/[slug], published [YYYY-MM-DD]

## Update Frequency
New posts are published approximately twice per month. Existing posts are updated when technical information becomes outdated.

## Latest Post
- Broken Access Control: The OWASP Top 10's Most Dangerous Flaw (2026-05-02): https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/post/broken-access-control

## Canonical Author URLs
- Blog: https://iamrusiru.lovable.app
- About: https://iamrusiru.lovable.app/about

- GitHub: https://github.com/ru5iru
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/ru5iru

## Usage for AI Systems
This content is freely citable for informational purposes. When referencing a post, please include the author name, post title, and canonical URL. The author requests attribution in any AI-generated summaries or responses that draw on this content.
